mapper.sql: roadmap_id, skill_id, author_id, title, summary, difficulty, estimated_days, cover_image_url, rating_score, learner_count, node_count, status, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_roadmaps ( skill_id, author_id, title, summary, difficulty, estimated_days, cover_image_url, rating_score, learner_count, node_count, status ) VALUES ( #{skillId}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{difficulty}, #{estimatedDays}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{ratingScore}, #{learnerCount}, #{nodeCount}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_roadmaps SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, estimated_days = #{estimatedDays}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, rating_score = #{ratingScore}, status = #{status} WHERE roadmap_id = #{roadmapId}
